Notes: UWO ranked 13th in the NCAA Dv. III by D3hoops.com...UWO snaps three-game
losing streak...UWO's seventh straight win over UWP...UWO jumped out to a 19-6
lead and led 43-12 with 43 seconds left in the second quarter...UWO's largest
lead was 68-33...Richard scored 12 points for UWO and Hartman 10 for UWP.
Game.Officials: Taylor DeValk,  Tim Duffy,  Blaine Hilgendorf
